name: trusted-shops
description: Read Trusted Shops (eTrusted) reviews, channels, and aggregate ratings, and schedule review invites

tools.name: List Reviews
tools.description: List service and product reviews for the whole account or specific channels, with filters and cursor pagination

channels.description: Comma-separated channel IDs (chl-...) to filter by; omit for all channels

rating.description: Comma-separated star ratings to include (1-5), e.g. 1,2

status.description: Comma-separated review states: APPROVED, MODERATION, REJECTED

submittedAfter.description: Only reviews submitted after this ISO 8601 timestamp

submittedBefore.description: Only reviews submitted before this ISO 8601 timestamp

hasReply.description: Filter by whether the review has a reply

query.description: Full-text search on order reference and customer email

orderBy.description: Sort field: submittedAt (default), editedAt, or updatedAt

after.description: Pagination cursor: review ID to start after

historicalSummary.omitted: review comment bodies, customer contact details, and survey payloads

tools.name: Get Review
tools.description: Get a single review with full comment, customer, transaction, product, and reply details

tools.name: List Channels
tools.description: List all review channels (shops/touchpoints) of the account with their IDs, names, URLs, and locales

tools.name: Get Channel Aggregate Rating
tools.description: Get aggregate service review ratings for a channel across 7-day, 30-day, 90-day, 365-day, and overall periods, including star distribution

tools.name: Create Review Invites
tools.description: Schedule review invite emails for one or more customers of a channel after a transaction

channel.description: Channel to send invites from, e.g. {"id": "chl-...", "type": "user_defined"}

system.description: Name of the system issuing the invites, e.g. your shop or CRM name

systemVersion.description: Version of the issuing system, e.g. 1.0

invites.description: 1-10000 invite objects, each with customer.email (required), template.id (required), questionnaireTemplate.id (required), transaction.reference (required), transaction.date, and optional products and preferredSendTime

tools.name: Get Reviews Count
tools.description: Get the total number of reviews matching a filter — cheap KPI queries without paging through review lists

channels.description: Channel IDs to count reviews for, e.g. chl-...

submittedAfter.description: Only reviews submitted after this ISO 8601 timestamp

submittedBefore.description: Only reviews submitted before this ISO 8601 timestamp

hasReply.description: Only count reviews with (true) or without (false) a reply

query.description: Full-text search across order reference and customer email

tools.name: Reply to Review
tools.description: Save a public reply on a review — the natural follow-up to negative reviews

comment.description: Reply text shown with the review

sendNotification.description: Notify the reviewer about the reply (default false)

prompts.title: Recent reviews
prompts.prompt: List my most recent Trusted Shops reviews and summarize ratings and common themes.

prompts.title: Negative reviews
prompts.prompt: Show Trusted Shops reviews with 1 or 2 stars from the last 30 days that have no reply yet.

prompts.title: Channel rating overview
prompts.prompt: List my Trusted Shops channels and show the 365-day aggregate rating for each.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Trusted Shops (eTrusted) API Setup

steps.title: Get an eTrusted account
steps.description: You need a Trusted Shops membership with access to the eTrusted Control Centre at https://app.etrusted.com/.

steps.title: Generate API credentials
steps.description: Follow https://developers.etrusted.com/docs/generating-api-credentials to create an API client in the Control Centre. You receive a client ID and a client secret.

steps.title: Set environment variables
steps.description: Add ETRUSTED_CLIENT_ID and ETRUSTED_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env. Access tokens are minted automatically from https://login.etrusted.com/oauth/token via the OAuth2 client_credentials grant with audience https://api.etrusted.com.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Channels — it requires no parameters and returns the channels (chl-... IDs) you will use to filter reviews and send invites.

notes: Access tokens expire after 300 seconds (5 minutes); they are refreshed automatically per request session.
The token request must include audience=https://api.etrusted.com alongside client_id, client_secret, and grant_type=client_credentials.
Review invites require an invite template and questionnaire template configured in the Control Centre; every invite must include both template.id and questionnaireTemplate.id.
